name: Remoulade Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the mayonnaise and Durkee's Famous Sauce.
2. Gradually pour in the olive oil while whisking.
3. Add the Creole or Poupon mustard and continue whisking.
4. Slowly incorporate horseradish, ketchup, wine vinegar, Lea & Perrins, and Louisiana hot sauce, whisking after each addition.
5. Season with salt to taste.
6. Serve over shrimp on a salad or use as a sandwich sauce.
